---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help identify and fix pipeline issues.
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: Colosyn

---

### 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
### 💻 System & Software Versions
* **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 22.04]
* **Blender Version**: [e.g., 4.2 LTS, 5.1.0]
* **Substance Painter Version**: [e.g., 10.1, 12.0]
* **BakeBridge Version**: [e.g., v1.0.0]
### 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error
### 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
### 📋 Console Logs & Screenshots
If applicable, paste your Blender System Console logs or drag-and-drop screenshots of the error window here.
